instruction: All three clock parts have drifted by small amounts. Restore each to its precise original position.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="clock" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="hour-hand" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" x1="68" y1="64" x2="68" y2="38" />
  <line id="minute-hand" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="64" y1="68" x2="88" y2="68" />
  <circle id="pivot" fill="#e63946" cx="66" cy="66" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="clock" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="hour-hand" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" x1="64" y1="64" x2="64" y2="38" />
  <line id="minute-hand" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="64" y1="64" x2="88" y2="64" />
  <circle id="pivot" fill="#e63946" cx="64" cy="64" r="2" />
</svg>
